title: CRSS Plugin
description: The main Plugin used in CRSS
body:
# CRSS Plugin
This is the main Plugin used in the [CRSS](https://crss.blurryface.xyz) server.
It features a Discord Bridge and One-Player sleep functionality.
## How can I use it?
Place the jar inside your ``plugins`` folder on any compatible Bukkit version. It should be compatible with versions foward from the main version, but probably won't work on older ones.
## What is CRSS?
CRSS is a server ran by [Blurryface](https://blurryface.xyz), hosted by [TheClashFruit](https://theclashfruit.me) which runs on older versions of Minecraft, updating every first day of every month. Previously, it was weekly updates. We started on ``beta 1.0`` and we are currently on ``release 1.11.2``. <!-- the previous edit was 1.5.2... wow. -->

You can take a look at our latest YouTube video here:
